{{Infobox religious building
| name = Himukai Shrine
| native_name = 日向神社
| mapframe = yes

| mapframe-wikidata = yes

{{nihongo|'''Himukai Shrine'''|日向神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Ōmi Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

* {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}}
* {{ill|Shikinai Hiteisha|lt=Shikinai Hiteisha|ja|比定社|qid=Q135026601|1=Shikinai Hiteisha}}
* {{ill|Shikinai Subshrine|lt=Shikinai Subshrine|qid=Q135100459|1=Shikinai Subshrine}}
* {{ill|Q845945|ltq=Q845945|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}}

== part of (P361) ==

* {{ill|Q11638477|ltq=Q11638477|qid=Q11638477|1=List of Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province}}<ref>https://jmapps.ne.jp/kokugakuin/det.html?data_id=181826</ref>
** Series ordinal: 46
* {{ill|Taga-taisha|lt=Taga Taisha|el|Τάγκα-τάισα|en|Taga-taisha|fr|Taga-taisha|ja|多賀大社|tr|Taga-taisha|zh|多賀大社|qid=Q402091|1=Taga-taisha}}

== coordinate location (P625) ==

* {{coord|35.225652|136.288983}}
